name: Tomato Cheese Round
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the shredded cheddar cheese, salad dressing (mayonnaise), diced green onion, diced green pepper, and garlic powder in a bowl.
2. Toast the rye bread lightly on just one side using a toaster or under the broiler.
3. Using a small biscuit cutter or the edge of a glass, cut the toasted bread into 4 slices each.
4. To slice the cherry tomatoes, carefully remove the top and bottom parts of each tomato with a sharp knife.
5. Spread a thin layer of salad dressing on the untoasted side of each bread round.
6. Place a sliced cherry tomato on the salad dressing, then mound about one teaspoon of the cheese mixture onto the tomato.
7. Sprinkle with paprika if desired.
8. Broil the assembled rounds in the oven until the cheese is bubbly and slightly golden.
9. Allow to cool for a few minutes before serving.
